steps.title: Locate the contrast
steps.content: The underlined portion describes scholarship that focuses on the most militant, outspoken Chicano movement figures. The next sentence contrasts that focus with Rivera's work on lower-profile institutions, which reveals a range of political orientations.

steps.title: Name the function
steps.content: A adds a reevaluation by researchers that the text never claims. B invents scholars' political motives. D shifts to the effectiveness of neighborhood institutions, which is not the point. The underlined portion identifies a common focus that hides ideological diversity. The answer is C.
